code_value: Scientists will put some robot fish into the sea near Spain this year. These robot fish will help people find out the pollution in the water. If the robot fish can finish their work successfully, the scientists hope the fish will be used in rivers, lakes and seas around the world. The robot fish are about 1.5 metres long. They can find the pollution in the water and then they will eat part of it. They can "swim" in the sea freely and send back information to people on the beach.
